title: Reprofile optimized suite and close initiative
summary: Rerun hotspot timings and the broad validation gate, then close the initiative once the suite is materially faster and still green.
scope_items: Re-time the hotspot files and compare them to the captured baseline.
Run the broad repository validation gate after the reductions land and then close the initiative.
done_when_items: The optimized suite has fresh timing evidence and a green validation gate.
The initiative can be closed with the repository back in a clean ready_for_bootstrap state.
